title: Tyler Technologies Named a Best Place to Work in Maine
text: YARMOUTH, Maine--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies has been recognized as a 2022 Best Place to Work in Maine.

title: Tyler (TYL) & Kentucky Extend Payment Services Deal for a Year
text: Tyler's (TYL) NIC extends its 19-year relationship with the Commonwealth of Kentucky and is likely to continue to provide more than 300 services and payment processing solutions for state government agencies.

title: Tyler Technologies Extends Contract for Digital Government and Payment Solutions in the Commonwealth of Kentucky
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced the Commonwealth of Kentucky has extended its contract for Tyler's digital government and payments services.

title: Tyler Technologies to Participate in August and September Investor Conferences
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies will participate in five investor conferences, being held in August and September 2022.

title: Dallas County Sheriff's Office Selects Tyler Technologies' Enterprise Corrections Solution
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced it has signed an agreement with the Dallas County Sheriff's Office in Texas for its Enterprise Corrections solution.

title: Tyler Technologies' Community Readiness Solution Aims to Reduce Recidivism in Davidson County, Tennessee
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies' Community Readiness solution aims to reduce recidivism in Davidson County, Tennessee.

title: Tyler Technologies' Silas Deane III Honored for Software Aimed at Reducing Recidivism Nationwide
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced that Tyler's Silas Deane III was recently awarded the Leadership and Innovation Award from the NACRJ.
